changeSet.author: satyam
changeSet.comment:
LRSIC compliance backfill — set expiryDate on all bureau_response rows where expiry_date is null.
Rule: expiryDate = pulled_at + 72 months (LRSIC Article 23). For rows without date_of_first_delinquency, use pulled_at as baseline. This ensures RetentionService can archive all existing rows correctly.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE bureau_response SET expiry_date = DATE_ADD(pulled_at, INTERVAL 72 MONTH) WHERE expiry_date IS NULL AND pulled_at IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE bureau_response SET expiry_date = TIMESTAMPADD(MONTH, 72, pulled_at) WHERE expiry_date IS NULL AND pulled_at IS NOT NULL;
